name: HR Onboarding Agent
description: Helps new employees navigate their first 90 days — from setup to team introductions and benefits enrollment.

conversation_starters.title: Week 1 checklist
conversation_starters.text: What's my first week checklist as a new employee?

conversation_starters.title: Dev environment setup
conversation_starters.text: How do I set up my development environment?

conversation_starters.title: Who should I meet?
conversation_starters.text: Who should I connect with in my first month?

conversation_starters.title: Benefits enrollment
conversation_starters.text: How do I enroll in company benefits?

conversation_starters.title: Company policies
conversation_starters.text: Where can I find the leave and time-off policy?

disclaimer.text: This agent is for employees only. Information is sourced from the HR SharePoint site. For urgent HR matters, contact hr@contoso.com directly.
